ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "lot_area" INTEGER /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "overall_quality" INTEGER /* Overall material and finish quality of the property (1-10 scale) */,
  "overall_condition" INTEGER /* Overall condition of the property (1-10 scale) */,
  "total_basement_sf" INTEGER /* Total square feet of basement area */,
  "full_bath" INTEGER /* Number of full bathrooms */,
  "half_bath" INTEGER /* Number of half bathrooms */,
  "bedrooms_above_grade" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms above grade (ground level) */,
  "total_rooms_above_grade" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms above grade (does not include bathrooms) */,
  "fireplaces" INTEGER /* Number of fireplaces */,
  "garage_area" INTEGER /* Size of the garage in square feet */,
  "above_median_price" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property price is above the median price */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (residential, commercial, etc.) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "number_of_stories" INTEGER /* Number of stories in the property */,
  "parking_type" TEXT /* Type of parking available (attached, detached, etc.) */,
  "pool" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property has a pool */,
  "view" TEXT /* Type of view from the property (ocean, mountain, etc.) */,
  "listing_price" TEXT /* Listing price of the property */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing agent */,
  "selling_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selling agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_listing_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_selling_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("selling_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the agent */,
  "brokerage" TEXT /* Name of the brokerage the agent belongs to */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the analyst */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company the analyst belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the client */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company the client belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the view */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view */,
  "view_description" TEXT /* Description of the view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id")
)
column_names: Size of the lot in square feet
